metadata.name: Retailer Requests a Quote for a New Product

description: A potential new customer requests a price quote for a large quantity of a specific product.

nodes.task_description: Identify the product and the requested quantity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the details of the request.

nodes.task_description: Check the pricing tiers to determine if a volume discount applies.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the quantity is large enough to qualify for a 10% discount.

nodes.task_description: Generate a formal price quote, including the discount and estimated shipping costs.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates an accurate and professional quote.

nodes.task_description: Send the quote to the potential customer.
